prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4G63T (from EVO III/IV) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT2860-5 turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 4-2-1 header and HKS Hi-Power SSQV blow-off valve

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder tuning, 4-bar MAP sensor, and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, paired with a custom wiring harness from Painless Performance for OEM+ integration and a Mishimoto aluminum radiator with dual 12-inch SPAL fans for cooling

Suspension overhaul with custom-valved Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (adjustable damping, 20-way rebound, 12-way compression) and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline front control arms, SuperPro rear trailing arm bushings), paired with a Cusco 2-point strut brace and a full Whiteline sway bar kit (22mm front, 18mm rear) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny L300-specific widebody kit (Pandem front bumper, overfenders, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a vented hood (Seibon carbon fiber, 30% weight reduction) featuring a central heat extractor for the 4G63T

Custom 5-spoke forged wheels (Work Emotion CR Kiwami, 16x8 +25 front, 16x9 +30 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (215/45/16 front, 235/40/16 rear) with custom wheel spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment and a subtle rear fender roll

Full OEM+ restomod interior with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (Mitsubishi-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (Momo quick-release hub), and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages bolt-in 6-point, mild steel with gusseted joints) painted in Mitsubishi Racing Green (MRG) with matching Alcantara door cards and shift boot (Sparco)
